subject: Release bootstrap 2.2.4
commit_message:
Release bootstrap 2.2.4

Update HV-VES to 1.6.0 (libs update)
Update DFC blueprint with CMPv2 config

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2537
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1795
Signed-off-by: Remigiusz Janeczek <remigiusz.janeczek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Id3046634bdf31dcbb08f0041c7549ec3e91bb661

Patch Set 1:

Wasn't sure if the python 3 / cloudify cli update needs to be coordinated with cm-container update later (and how is that progressing). If that won't be an issue I can update this commit to release bootstrap 3.0.0

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> Wasn't sure if the python 3 / cloudify cli update needs to be coordinated with cm-container update later (and how is that progressing). If that won't be an issue I can update this commit to release bootstrap 3.0.0

I think it's OK to release this.  The 3.0.0 version of bootstrap requires changes to the Helm charts in OOM (more than just updating the versions) for both bootstrap and Cloudify Manager.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1:
> > 
> > Wasn't sure if the python 3 / cloudify cli update needs to be coordinated with cm-container update later (and how is that progressing). If that won't be an issue I can update this commit to release bootstrap 3.0.0
> 
> I think it's OK to release this.  The 3.0.0 version of bootstrap requires changes to the Helm charts in OOM (more than just updating the versions) for both bootstrap and Cloudify Manager.

Yeah agree with Jack. Its okay to release this version (2.2.4) and update OOM independently.

Jack - When ready pls update bootstrap 3.0.0 snapshot (along with chart changes for moving consul init load) into 116731 to validate gating jobs.

(1 comment)

Remi - Can you also update this snapshot under OOM to verify gating jobs?
